_purpose: INVARIANT B ground-truth pin for the Zigha case. Source-of-truth for which addresses MUST appear in every Recupero brief generated against the Zigha victim seed (0x0cdC902f...). When this fixture is copied into a case directory as `ground_truth.json`, the output_integrity validator's `destinations_superset_of_ground_truth` check enforces superset coverage. See docs/TRACE_COVERAGE_DIAGNOSIS_ZIGHA.md for the v0.27.1 coverage-gap diagnosis that motivated this fixture.
_provenance: 0xF4bE…FAD2: Arbitrum-side consolidation hub. Confirmed in journal.txt + tests/test_brief.py (PERP1 constant). The v0.27.1 worker DID find this address — it's the pre-bridge hop the trace stops at.
0x3daFC6a8…: Ethereum dormant DAI holder, ~$9.98M. Documented in journal.txt 'Known numbers' + src/recupero/dormant/finder.py docstring + tests/test_v14.py PERP_DORMANT_DAI constant.
0x415D8D07…: Ethereum dormant DAI holder, ~$6.91M. Same provenance set as 0x3daFC6a8.

Remaining destinations from the CFI-00265 report (ZIGHA-ETH-26D20f, -37fc5f, -c1ee32, -3e2E66af) are listed by 4-byte prefix in journal.txt but not yet resolved to full hex strings in any committed artifact. Add to expected_destinations as full hex strings become operator-confirmed. INVARIANT B silently passes prefix-only entries (skipped via the EVM-hex regex guard) so this fixture stays usable until the rest are filled in.
_known_coverage_gap_v0271: Per docs/TRACE_COVERAGE_DIAGNOSIS_ZIGHA.md the v0.27.1 worker found 1 of 7 known Zigha destinations (the Arbitrum hub 0xF4bE only). Bridge-following (DeBridge DLN + 1inch on Arbitrum) is the dominant blocker. v0.28+ resolves with bridges.json seeds + bridge_calldata decoders + RECUPERO_CROSS_CHAIN_CONTINUATION=1 default. Once v0.28 ships, running validate_case_output against ZIGHA-VERIFY with this fixture in place must surface zero INVARIANT B violations.

expected_destinations._notes: The v0.27.1 worker DID find this address. Listed here for completeness so a future regression that loses Arbitrum-side coverage trips INVARIANT B.
DAI is permissionless — no issuer-level freeze. Subpoena-target candidate per docs/v0.28_subpoena_targets_design.md.
DAI is permissionless — no issuer-level freeze. Subpoena-target candidate per docs/v0.28_subpoena_targets_design.md.
